custom_font_css: @font-face { font-family: 'Skellyv2'; src: url('/fonts/Skellyv2-Regular.woff2') format('woff2'); font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; } @font-face { font-family: 'Comico'; src: url('/fonts/Comico-Regular.woff2') format('woff2'), url('/fonts/Comico-Regular.woff') format('woff'); font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; }
